nasb.text: The arrogance of your heart has deceived you, You who live in the clefts of the rock, In the loftiness of your dwelling place, Who say in your heart, ‘Who will bring me down to earth?’

esv.text: The pride of your heart has deceived you, you who live in the clefts of the rock, in your lofty dwelling, who say in your heart, “Who will bring me down to the ground?”

cnv.text: 你心中的傲氣欺騙了你； 你這住在巖石的隱密處， 居所在高處的啊！ 你心裡說： “誰能把我拉下地呢？”

ccb.text: 你住在悬崖峭壁间， 住在高山上， 自以为谁也不能把你拉下来， 但你的骄傲欺骗了你。
